body: A grid-style FM matrix sets how operators modulate each other, so you can dial in bright metallic or bell tones and then tame them through the analog-modelled LP/BP/HP filter, which has its own dedicated envelope for movement.
Eight-voice stereo unison thickens leads and pads, and the built-in FX rack (multi-tap delay, chorus, phaser, reverb, EQ, distortion) finishes the sound without leaving the plugin.
